body: Dr. Meera, JIDA's Oct issue landed. One item relevant to your high-risk adult patients — 2,100-patient trial showed 3-month fluoride recall cuts caries recurrence 38% better than 6-month. Worth a look (2-min abstract). Want me to pull it + draft a patient-ed WhatsApp you can share? — JIDA Oct 2026 p.14
rationale: External research digest with merchant-relevant clinical anchor (high-risk-adult cohort from her customer_aggregate). Source citation maintains credibility. Open-ended CTA invites continuation.

body: Hi Priya, Dr. Meera's clinic here 🦷 It's been 5 months since your last visit — your 6-month cleaning recall is due. Apke liye 2 slots ready hain: Wed 5 Nov, 6pm ya Thu 6 Nov, 5pm. ₹299 cleaning + complimentary fluoride. Reply 1 for Wed, 2 for Thu, or tell us a time that works.
rationale: Customer-scoped recall. Honors Priya's hi-en mix language pref + weekday-evening preference. Real catalog price + real available slots. Multi-choice with open fallback.

body: Bharat, heads-up: your calls dropped 50% this week (vs 12 avg). This can spiral fast. Action: review your GBP description completeness + check if any recent reviews mention availability issues. Want me to run a quick profile audit? Live in 3 min.
rationale: Performance dip alert with specific delta. Saves merchant from not acting. Offers concrete diagnostic (profile audit). Time-capped CTA (3 min) reduces friction.

body: Renewal coming up, Bharat — your Pro plan expires in 12 days (May 8). ₹4,999 renews the next 90 days. Want me to email you the renewal link, or handle it now? No surprises — same price, same features.
rationale: Urgency framing (12 days). Specific renewal amount. Removes friction (email link offered). Binary CTA.

body: Hi Lakshmi! Quick check — what service has been most asked-for this week at Studio11? I'll turn the answer into a Google post + a 4-line WhatsApp reply you can use when customers ask about pricing. Takes 5 min.
rationale: Low-stakes question (no commitment). Reciprocity offered upfront (Google post + draft). Effort externalization (5 min). Respects merchant time.

body: Hi Kavya 💍 Lakshmi from Studio11 Kapra here. 196 days to your wedding — perfect window to start the 30-day skin-prep program before serious bridal bookings roll in. ₹2,499 covers 4 sessions + take-home kit. Want me to block your preferred Saturday 4pm slot for the first session next week?
rationale: Wedding-date specificity + days-to-wedding count. Relationship continuity (from trial). Urgency framing (window opens). Single binary commit. Owner's first name.

body: Quick heads-up Suresh — DC vs MI at Arun Jaitley tonight, 7:30pm. Important: Saturday IPL matches usually shift -12% restaurant covers (people watch at home). Skip the match-night promo today; instead push your BOGO pizza (already active) as a delivery-only Saturday special. Want me to draft the Swiggy banner + Insta story? Live in 10 min.
rationale: Counter-intuitive specific data (-12% covers). Saves merchant from bad decision. Leverages existing offer (BOGO). Concrete deliverables. 10-min effort cap.

body:
Suresh, here's a starter version — you can edit:

Mylari Corporate Thali — for offices in Indiranagar
- 10 thalis @ ₹125 each (₹25 off retail) + free delivery
- 25 thalis @ ₹115 each + 2 free filter coffees
- 50+: ₹105 each + 1 free dosa platter
- WhatsApp day-before by 5pm; deliver 12:30-1pm

3 offices in radius: Embassy Tech, RMZ Eco, Sigma Soft. Want me to draft the outreach WhatsApp?
rationale: Direct continuation of merchant's planning intent. Complete drafted artifact (no extra work). Tiered pricing matches B2B logic. Concrete radius + named buildings. Follow-on offer.

body: Karthik, your views are down 30% this week — but I want to flag this is the normal April-June acquisition lull (every metro gym sees -25 to -35% in this window). Action: skip ad spend now, save it for Sept-Oct when conversion is 2x. For now, focus retention on your 245 members. Want me to draft a summer attendance challenge?
rationale: Anxiety pre-emption (the dip is normal). Data anchor (-25 to -35%). Reframe as opportunity (save spend). Specific member count. Owner's first name.

body: Hi Rashmi 👋 Karthik from PowerHouse here. It's been about 8 weeks — happens to most members at some point, no judgment. We've added a Tue/Thu evening HIIT class (45 min, 6:30pm) that fits weight-loss goals well. Want me to hold a free trial spot for you next Tue, 30 Apr? Reply YES — no commitment, no auto-charge.
rationale: No-shame framing + warmth. Addresses her past goal (weight loss). Specific new offering. No-commitment trial. Single binary CTA. Owner's first name.

body: Ramesh, urgent: voluntary recall on 2 atorvastatin batches (AT2024-1102, AT2024-1108) by Mfr Z — sub-potency, no safety risk, but customers should be informed for replacement. Pulled your repeat-Rx list: 22 of your chronic-Rx customers were dispensed these batches in last 90 days. Want me to draft their WhatsApp note + replacement-pickup workflow?
rationale: Urgency + specificity (batch numbers, manufacturer). Risk-but-bounded framing. Derived count from merchant data (22 of 240). End-to-end workflow offer.

body: Namaste — Apollo Health Plus Malviya Nagar yahan. Sharma ji ki 3 monthly medicines (metformin, atorvastatin, telmisartan) 28 April ko khatam hongi. Same dose, same brand pack ready hai. Senior discount 15% applied — total ₹1,420 (₹240 saved). Free home delivery to saved address by 5pm tomorrow. Reply CONFIRM to dispatch, or call 9876543210 if any change in dosage.
rationale: Namaste salutation (respectful). Full molecule names (precision). Specific date + total + savings. Two-channel option (reply OR call). Senior-citizen norms honored.

body: Hi Priya, it's been exactly 3 months since your 90-min deluxe facial! Your skin goals have probably shifted by now — we've brought in a new Korean face-lifting serum. Want me to book you for a skin reassessment + intro session? ₹399 (normally ₹699, first-time offer). Wed or Thu at 6pm?
rationale: Time-specific follow-up (exactly 3 months). Addresses evolving needs. Specific new offering + real discount. Preferred time honored. Two options given.

body: Your gym membership is expiring tomorrow — but first, you've hit a milestone! 50 days consistent attendance 🎉. Keep the streak going. Renew now @ ₹2,999/mo, or chat if you want to pause. Either way, your streak data stays saved. Decide?
rationale: Urgency (expiring tomorrow). Celebrates progress (milestone framing). Removes guilt (pause option available). Binary CTA. Personalization (streak data).

body: Dr. Meera, DCI just revised their radiograph dose limits — effective Dec 15, max dose drops 1.5→1.0 mSv per IOPA. Your current E-speed film is compliant; D-speed is not. Heads-up in case any labs are still stocked with D-speed. Source: DCI circular 2026-11-04. Any questions?
rationale: Critical compliance update with source citation. Specific deadline (Dec 15). Clear implications (E-speed OK, D-speed not). Demonstrates category expertise.

body: Your restaurant has 4 really positive reviews mentioning 'ambiance + outdoor seating' this month — but 4 mentions of late delivery too (avg complaint: 50min for 15min ride). Quick win: post a Google update about your delivery-partner SLA or offer a 5% delivery-delay credit. Want me to draft both?
rationale: Positive + negative balanced. Specific numbers (4 mentions each). Actionable quick-wins. Concrete next step (draft both). Reciprocity.

body: Glamour Salon — notice your plan expired 38 days ago. During that time, 24 new lapsed customers entered your cohort (they came in, didn't return). Reactivating now means capturing these 24 + ongoing walk-ins. ₹2,999 renewal, 90 days. Ready?
rationale: Loss aversion framing (24 lapsed entered while dormant). Quantified opportunity cost. Specific renewal amount + duration. Clear binary.

body: You're 45 days from 100 reviews — the momentum is real. One more push (maybe 3-5 more positive reviews) and you'll hit the milestone. Want me to draft a follow-up email to recent walk-ins asking for a quick review? Could be the tipping point.
rationale: Milestone visualization (45 days away). Momentum framing. Social proof (momentum is real). Concrete action (review email). Binary CTA.

body: This Saturday, 6 major Bengaluru IT offices will have team lunches (company all-hands). Your delivery radius covers 3 of them. Standard order: 12-15 bulk lunches @ ₹85/plate. Want me to send a cold outreach WhatsApp to each facility manager? I've pre-drafted it.
rationale: Specific event (Saturday team lunches). Quantified opportunity (6 offices, covers 3). Specific order pattern (12-15 @ ₹85). Artifact offered (pre-drafted outreach).

body: Your 'Teeth Whitening @ ₹1,499' offer is live but 0 takers in 14 days. Possible reasons: (a) price point, (b) not in your GBP photos, or (c) wrong audience. Quick diagnostic: can you share how many inquiries you got about whitening in the last 30 days? I'll help optimize.
rationale: Offer underperformance flagged. Hypotheses offered (not blame). Asks-the-merchant lever (Cialdini hook). Reciprocity (I'll help optimize).

body: Weather alert: 42°C today in Delhi. Customers searching 'AC gyms near me' +35% vs normal. Your PowerHouse listing doesn't mention AC in the description. Quick fix: update GBP 'Amenities' section to add AC + maybe draft a WhatsApp about beat-the-heat summer classes? Want it live before 2pm?
rationale: Real-time opportunity (heat wave today). Data-informed (searches +35%). Actionable fix (GBP update). Time-bound (before 2pm). Urgency without alarm.

body: 3 pharmacies in your neighborhood launched home-delivery programs last month. You haven't. Customers are searching 'Sharma pharmacy home delivery' — but finding competitors first. Want me to draft a home-delivery launch plan + a WhatsApp template you can send your regular customers?
rationale: Competitive pressure flagged. Customer search behavior cited. Loss aversion (customers finding competitors). Artifact offered (launch plan + template).

body: Your reviews mention 'friendly staff' 9 times in 30 days — that's +3 vs peer avg. Your staff is a competitive advantage. Have you thought about a team photo on GBP? Builds trust + differentiates you from chains. Want me to draft copy for the team to pose + caption?
rationale: Social proof (friendly mentions). Competitive positioning (vs chains). Actionable (team photo). Reciprocity (I'll draft copy). Celebrates strength.

body: Diwali planning (6 months out): your category (restaurants) typically sees +40% footfall Oct 15-Nov 10 (festival season prep + post-Diwali). Want me to help you plan a pre-Diwali offer package now? Examples: family bundles, catering specials. Early booking = better pricing on suppliers.
rationale: Seasonal planning signal (6mo ahead). Category benchmark (+40%). Reciprocity (help package). Strategic timing (supplier advantage).

body: Your beauty salon has 62 reviews (peer avg 52) but CTR is 2.2% (peer avg 3.0%). Gap suggests your description is unclear about services/pricing. Quick audit: can you share your current GBP description? I'll spot the gaps + draft an improved version.
rationale: Data-driven diagnosis (CTR gap). Quantified peer comparison. Actionable diagnostic. Asks-the-merchant (low friction). Reciprocity.

body: Hi Arjun, your first gym visit was 2 months ago (orientation + 1 week trial). You paid for the first month but haven't shown up in 30 days. Life happens — no guilt. We've launched a new beginner-friendly Yoga + Strength blend (Mon/Wed/Fri 5-6pm). Want me to hold a spot for you next Monday @ no extra cost?
rationale: Gentle lapse recovery (no guilt). Addresses past preference (orientation done). New offering matches beginner-friendly. Free trial spot. Binary CTA.

body: Your dentistry offer 'Free Consultation' has 2,100+ impressions but only 5 clicks (CTR 0.24%, vs peer avg 3.0%). Hypothesis: 'Free' doesn't differentiate in the category. Try 'Free Smile Assessment + Digital Scan' instead (more specific, higher perceived value). Want me to test this for you?
rationale: Offer underperformance analyzed. Specific data (2,100 impressions, 5 clicks). Peer benchmark. Hypothesis + solution offered. A/B test proposed.

body: Your latest post ('Monsoon Hair Care Tips') has 24 likes in 3 days — 4x your avg post engagement. Audience loves practical content. Want me to draft 3 more seasonal hair tips (monsoon + humidity-focused) you can post weekly? These might climb your overall engagement + CTR.
rationale: Engagement pattern recognized (24 likes = 4x avg). Content-type signal (practical tips work). Reciprocity (I'll draft 3). Scalability offered.

body: Pharmacist Ramesh, your store hasn't been on the Vera digest for 3 months (usually appears 2-3x/quarter with health alerts). New compliance items landed this week that might interest your customers: medication interaction checker tool + new diabetes screening guidelines. Want me to feature you prominently in next week's digest + co-write an alert?
rationale: Visibility opportunity (digest placement). Reciprocity (co-write alert). Authority reinforcement (compliance positioning). High engagement signal.

body: Your gym's WhatsApp group has 150 members but zero engagement in 3 weeks. Opportunity: weekly challenge posts (e.g., '7-day plank challenge' with photo submissions) drive engagement + retention. Want me to design a 4-week challenge calendar + post templates? Takes 30 min to set up, high ROI.
rationale: Untapped asset (150 members, zero engagement). Clear action (challenges). Effort externalization (design calendar). ROI framed. Binary CTA.
